text:
Its been waaaay too long!
Cannot believe how quickly our first year business has gone in! feel like just yesterday was taking the tentative steps launching and now its over year and are busy,busy, busy!
This year really aim post update once month keep you date with all that happening salon. Please bare with while make habit!
far this year has been pretty good and hope you all had wonderfull Christmas and New Year.
Last week The Vintage Beauty Box was involved Catwalk Fashion Show with The University Andrews. had great time creating makeup looks for the stunning models the theme street style. got work with one favs Kerry from Pretty You. make fab team, even say myself! Check out our facebook page for some images behind the scenes and also from the catwalk!
Other than posting more here another big aim improve what offer you guys salon. looking for suggestions things you would like see being offered. have already booked attend gel overlay course help those with nails that are thin, bendy, brittle and generally not the greatest health you too can enjoy beautiful nails. But there anything else? Get touch and let know!
are continuing our support Look Good, Feel Better through assisting workshops and fundraising. Watch this space for the first fundraiser! addition this will also launching taster facial sessions giving you the chance experience our amazing systems 30mins! Look out for our announcement our Facebook page!
And last but means least are currently awaiting the building our brand new nail bar, located the cafe the salon! are very excited have this bespoke area! Keep watchfull eye Facebook for potential offer once its bult!
Thats all for now, see you soon!

came steriods weeks ago and have zero spermcount.
was months but only deca and winny
months winny too?? hmm, interesting.
I'd curious see your liver values changed all.
how much winny did you do?
have this correct, you did 200mg deca and winny for months? Man that way too long and plus 200 deca waste.. wouldve done least 400 deca week from week but not months. Also would bump winny from week -11 and course your clomids.
Yikes! month cycle? Maybe your balls forgot what they were there for!
You might want re-post the message with different subject line get input from people that might knwo about restroing test after long cycle.
Something like: "Need Advice How Restore Natural Test. Production After Very Long Cycle!"
months??? whoa, why didnt double the dodage for periodod weeks instead months??
not many people know what stone is. can you translate that into kilograms least?
you were for months then may take months longer (or never) get normal sperm production again.
not use hcg right now, will only make your recovery process worse. just keep hitting the clomid 50mg/day.
